title: T-059 — UI: Pipeline Kanban view (Pipeline prototype) — DnD between gate columns (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-059 — Pipeline Kanban view UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.8, §17.12 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md pipeline_kanban
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:19-52 (KanbanCard + KanbanView)

## Goal
Client component KanbanView rendering 6 columns (G0-G4 + Launched) with project cards, drag-and-drop adjacency-guarded via @dnd-kit/core, optimistic UI revert on 422 ADJACENCY_VIOLATION. Mounted at /(npd)/pipeline?view=kanban (default).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/kanban-view.tsx ('use client') uses @dnd-kit/core; renders shadcn Card per project; column header per gate with count.
2. onDragEnd calls advanceProjectGate(projectId, targetGate) — optimistic update + rollback on error.
3. Card content matches prototype: code, name, prio badge, owner, target_launch.
4. RTL test asserts 6 columns + card rendering + DnD adjacency rejection (mock action returns 422).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/kanban-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/kanban-card.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/_components/__tests__/kanban-view.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/pipeline.jsx:19-52 (KanbanCard + KanbanView), then it has 6 gate columns (G0,G1,G2,G3,G4,Launched), KanbanCard with code+name+prio badge+owner+target_launch, and uses @dnd-kit/core + shadcn Card primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given a card is dragged from G2 to G3 (adjacent), when drop fires, then advanceProjectGate is invoked with targetGate=G3 and UI updates optimistically per §17.12 adjacency rule
3. Given the action returns 422 ADJACENCY_VIOLATION, when the drop completes, then the card snaps back to its source column and a toast shows the error per §17.12 optimistic-revert contract

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting 6 columns + card content + DnD adjacent + 422 revert before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test kanban-view'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-adjacent drop without server validation
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to @dnd-kit + shadcn
- Do not skip optimistic revert UX
